body.title: Seed PROC_DECIDED_HANDOFF — Igor handles /decided by gathering context and posting Claude handoff
body.result: seeded via claudecode/seed_process_habits.py — PROC_DECIDED_HANDOFF cognitive habit, [DECIDED_HANDOFF] channel protocol defined
body.description: Seed a workflow habit PROC_DECIDED_HANDOFF triggered by '/decided' from Akien. Igor: (1) reads ring memory for what was just discussed, (2) synthesizes what was decided, (3) posts structured [@Claude /decided] message to channel with summary + context, (4) acknowledges to Akien that the hand-off is posted and Claude needs to be notified. Format: '[DECIDED_HANDOFF] What was decided: <summary>. Context: <background>. Requesting /decided ritual from Claude.' This is the Igor side of the decided discussion protocol.
